article.body_preview:
RAJSHAHI, March 3, 2023 (BSS) - The overall situation in the Rajshahi city became volatile amid the spontaneous protest of general masses since March 1 in 1971 when the then Pakistani rulers had postponed the scheduled March 3 session of National Assembly.

Suspension of the scheduled parliament session by the Pakistani junta, as part of a heinous conspiracy, instantly turned the Rajshahi people revolutionary since the beginning of March in 1971 with impulsive protest of the common people.

Fath

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Total general strike was observed in the city paralyzing the civic lives and business activities.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article explicitly states a city-wide general strike paralyzed civic and business activity, which matches Factory_Issue's scope of operational disruptions (including labor strikes).

llm_connections.evidence_quote: Total general strike was observed in the city paralyzing the civic lives and business activities.
llm_connections.scope_justification: The article links a general strike to paralysis of business activity and also states that "production in mills and factories throughout the city remained stopped for an indefinite period", matching Production's scope (manufactured output).
